parameters.jsCode:
const categories = JSON.parse($input.first().json.categories);
return categories.map(c => ({ json: c }));

values.content: =Extract product information from this dental supply product page HTML. Return ONLY valid JSON with these fields (use null for missing fields): {"product_name": "string", "brand": "string or null", "sku": "string or null", "price": "string or null", "unit_size": "string or null", "availability": "string or null", "description": "string or null", "image_urls": ["url"] or []}. HTML: {{ $json.raw_html }}
